hooks.command:
bash -c '
INPUT=$(cat)
CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"command\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null || echo "")
echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "git (checkout|switch)" || exit 0
ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0
cd "$ROOT"
HAS_CHANGES=false
git diff --quiet || HAS_CHANGES=true
git diff --cached --quiet || HAS_CHANGES=true
git ls-files --others --exclude-standard | grep -q . && HAS_CHANGES=true
[ "$HAS_CHANGES" = "true" ] || exit 0
BRANCH=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")
git add -A
git commit -m "chore: auto-commit before switching from $BRANCH"
echo "[pre-checkout] 已自动提交 $BRANCH 的改动"
exit 0
'

bash -c 'ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; cd "$ROOT"; git diff --quiet && git diff --cached --quiet || (git add -A && git commit -m "chore: auto-commit session changes" && echo "[stop-hook] 已自动提交") || true'

bash -c 'ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; cd "$ROOT"; BRANCH=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); [ "$BRANCH" = "main" ] || exit 0; UNPUSHED=$(git log origin/main..HEAD --oneline 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d " "); [ "$UNPUSHED" -gt 0 ] && echo "[sync-hint] main 有 ${UNPUSHED} 个未推送提交，如需同步到子分支可运行：bash .claude/shared/scripts/sync-to-branches.sh --branches xyzh,assets" || true'
